Writer.java

00038 
00039 package java.io;
00040 
00041 /* Written using "Java Class Libraries", 2nd edition, plus online
00042  * API docs for JDK 1.2 beta from http://www.javasoft.com.
00043  * Status:  Believed complete and correct.
00044  */
00045 
00056 public abstract class Writer
00057 {
00063     protected Object lock;
00064 
00069     protected Writer()
00070     {
00071         lock = this;
00072     }
00073 
00081     protected Writer(Object lock)
00082     {
00083         if (lock == null)
00084             throw new NullPointerException();
00085 
00086       this.lock = lock;
00087     }
00088 
00096     public void write(int b) throws IOException
00097     {
00098         char[] buf = new char[1];
00099 
00100         buf[0] = (char)b;
00101         write(buf, 0, buf.length);
00102     }
00103 
00114     public void write(char[] buf) throws IOException
00115     {
00116         write(buf, 0, buf.length);
00117     }
00118 
00131     public abstract void write(char[] buf, int offset, int len) 
00132         throws IOException;
00133 
00142     public void write(String str) throws IOException
00143     {
00144         write(str, 0, str.length());
00145     } 
00146 
00158     public void write(String str, int offset, int len) throws IOException
00159     {
00160         // FIXME - for libgcj re-write using native code to not require 
00161         // copied buffer.
00162         char[] buf = new char[len];
00163 
00164         str.getChars(offset, offset + len, buf, 0);
00165         write(buf, 0, len);
00166     }
00167 
00177     public abstract void flush() throws IOException;
00178 
00189     public abstract void close() throws IOException;
00190 } // class Writer
00191
